items.br: Extrai o assignment primário dos colaboradores, com grade, step, business unit e vigência. Visão central do vínculo empregatício principal para análises de workforce e compensação.
items.en: Extracts the worker's primary assignment, with grade, step, business unit, and effective dates. Central view of the main employment relationship for workforce and compensation analyses.
items.es: Extrae el assignment primario de los colaboradores, con grade, step, business unit y vigencia. Visión central del vínculo laboral principal para análisis de workforce y compensación.
